author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Added 'aligned: bool' to ArrayFlags (numpy NPY_ARRAY_ALIGNED equivalent), populated in all 5 flags() impls.

Vec<T>-allocator paths (Array/ArcArray/CowArray): aligned=true unconditionally; the allocator guarantees alignment for T.
View paths (ArrayView/ArrayViewMut): runtime check '(ptr as usize) % align_of::<T>() == 0' on head-of-buffer pointer. Views from raw pointers via from_shape_ptr can be misaligned and will report aligned=false.

2 tests added covering owned arrays of f64/i32/u8.

ferray-core: 620 -> 621 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Full workspace builds clean. Commit fb555085.
